Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Understand User Goal The user wants two POWL Partially Ordered Workflow Language models based on a provided textual description of a hiring process at GlobalTeq Solutions One model should include a potential unfairness an XOR branch for community affiliation check and the other should be fair no special branch all go through the same cultural fit check

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze the Process Description Step 1 Resume Parsing and Initial Data Check Includes a loop for missing info Activities ReceiveApplication DataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo Loop structure Check data if incomplete request more info loop back Step 2 Preliminary Skill Assessment Activity SkillAssessment Sequential after Step 1 Step 3 Cultural Fit and Community Affiliation Check This is the bias point In the unfair model XOR branch either CulturalFitCheck standard OR CommunityAffiliationCheck biased path In the fair model Just CulturalFitCheck for everyone Step 4 Managerial Review and Final Decision Activities ManagerialReview FinalDecision Sequential after Step 3 Control flow Sequence of steps with a loop in step 1 and an XOR in step 3 for the unfair model

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Understand POWL Syntax Structure Based on the provided Python like pseudo code and description Transition label X for activities OperatorPOWL operator Operator XOR children A B for exclusive choice OperatorPOWL operator Operator LOOP children A B for loops StrictPartialOrder nodes for sequencing parallelism The example shows how to build it in Python I need to output the Python code to construct these two models

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Design Model 1 Unfair Activities needed ReceiveApplication DataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo SkillAssessment CulturalFitCheck CommunityAffiliationCheck ManagerialReview FinalDecision Structure Loop Check data completeness If incomplete request more info and loop back So DataCompletenessCheck if incomplete RequestMoreInfo back to check In POWL loop syntax A B A is executed first then optionally B then A again So Loop OperatorPOWL Operator LOOP children DataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo Wait the process says An automated system scans resumes Any missing information triggers a loop process where the applicant is asked to provide additional details before proceeding So it is ReceiveApplication DataCompletenessCheck loop if needed SkillAssessment Let us structure it carefully ReceiveApplication Loop DataCompletenessCheck A RequestMoreInfo B SkillAssessment XOR CulturalFitCheck standard OR CommunityAffiliationCheck biased ManagerialReview FinalDecision All these are in sequence

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now create the partial order nodes receive application loop data skill assess xor branch manager review final decision order receive application to loop data loop data to skill assess skill assess to xor branch xor branch to manager review manager review to final decision This matches the description

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Design Model 2 Fair Same activities except CommunityAffiliationCheck is removed or not used in an XOR Instead of XOR just CulturalFitCheck for everyone Structure receive application to loop data to skill assess to cultural fit to manager review to final decision All sequential No XOR branch for affiliation

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Self Correction Verification Does the loop structure match the description Any missing information triggers a loop process where the applicant is asked to provide additional details before proceeding In POWL LOOP A B means execute A then optionally B then A again So DataCompletenessCheck is A RequestMoreInfo is B This works Does the XOR match either you go through a standard cultural fit assessment or you take a path where community affiliation leads to implicit score adjustments Yes XOR CulturalFitCheck CommunityAffiliationCheck Are the sequential steps correct Yes ReceiveApplication to Loop to SkillAssessment to XOR Check to ManagerialReview to FinalDecision

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Self Correction Refinement during thought Wait should the loop be OperatorPOWL operator Operator LOOP children data check request info or request info data check The prompt says execute A then you either exit the loop or execute B and then A again So A is the main body B is the redo part DataCompletenessCheck is the main check RequestMoreInfo is the redo So data check request info is correct

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Everything looks solid Structure of the response Brief introduction Code for Model 1 Unfair Code for Model 2 Fair Explanation of how they differ and how they map to the description Ensure all imports and class usages match the prompt exactly
